narrative:
Prairie-G (precinct in Franklin County) has 759 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
